qa.message: QA testing not yet performed — run /rq:qa for browser testing

findings_details.title: hasProject guard is always true — projectId is non-optional
findings_details.body: props.projectId is typed as 'number' (non-optional) in RiskLayersPaneProps, so 'props.projectId != null' is always true. The guard misleads future readers into thinking 'no project' is reachable at this callsite.

findings_details.title: Loading tier doc-comment thresholds do not match the constants
findings_details.body: Comment says '5s' and '12s' but SLOW_LOAD_MS=4_000 (4s) and VERY_SLOW_LOAD_MS=10_000 (10s). The constants are authoritative; update the comment to say 'After 4s' and 'After 10s'.

findings_details.title: ErrorRow duplicates the keyboard-accessible div-button pattern from RiskLayerRow
findings_details.body: ErrorRow (lines 139-159) reimplements role='button', tabIndex=0, data-event='select-risk-layer', and onKeyDown Enter/Space handling — the same pattern already in RiskLayerRow. Extract a shared RowShell component that accepts onClick and className, used by both RiskLayerRow and ErrorRow.

findings_details.title: SEGMENT_FILL and SEGMENT_ORDER duplicated in ConcernBar and ChartConcernBar
findings_details.body: ConcernBar.tsx lines 26-33 and ChartConcernBar.tsx lines 7-14 define identical SEGMENT_FILL (Record<..., string>) and SEGMENT_ORDER arrays. Move both to the shared georisk-segmentation lib (e.g. concern-mapping.ts or a new concern-colors.ts) and import from both components.

findings_details.title: ChartConcernSegment cyc 12 — gate violation
findings_details.body: The gate reports ChartConcernSegment at cyclomatic complexity 12 (max 8). The complexity lives in buildSegmentClassName, which receives 6 boolean flags. Replace the 5 isFirst/isLast/isHovered/isAnyHovered/isActiveFilter booleans with a pre-computed 'displayState' (e.g. 'hovered' | 'dimmed' | 'active-filter' | 'default') and separate the rounding flags (isFirst/isLast) into the caller via a style prop. This brings the function under 8 branches.

findings_details.title: RiskLayersPane cyclomatic complexity 13 and 108 lines — gate violation
findings_details.body: Gate reports RiskLayersPane at cyc 13 (max 8) and 108 lines (max 50). The function mixes: (1) data hook delegation, (2) loading state composition, (3) framer-motion width animation, (4) collapse toggle with aria prop building including keyboard handling, and (5) conditional CSS class selection. Extract buildAriaProps and its keyboard handler to useCollapsedPaneControls(expanded, onExpand) returning { ariaProps }. Move the expanded/collapsed CSS class selection inline to the JSX. This reduces the function's branch count to under 8.

findings_details.title: LiveSegmentationMap 72 lines — gate violation
findings_details.body: Gate reports LiveSegmentationMap at 72 lines (max 50). The function manages concern hover state (2 callbacks), fullscreen state (1 callback + keyboard effect), the concern relay hook call, and layout rendering. Extract the concern hover callbacks + state into a useConcernHover() hook returning { hoveredConcernLevel, handleConcernHoverEnter, handleConcernHoverLeave }. Extract the fullscreen state + Escape keyboard effect into a useFullscreen() hook returning { isFullscreen, toggleFullscreen }. The component body then becomes 5 hook calls + 2 JSX lines.

findings_details.title: ConcernBar 58 lines — gate violation
findings_details.body: Gate reports ConcernBar at 58 lines (max 50). The function mixes dim logic, segment iteration, hover/active state, and tooltip building. Extract the segment rendering loop body into a ConcernBarSegment inner component (similar to the ChartConcernSegment pattern). That brings ConcernBar's JSX to ~8 lines plus the helper call.

findings_details.title: RiskLayerRow 51 lines — 1 over the gate limit
findings_details.body: Gate reports RiskLayerRow at 51 lines (max 50). Extracting the keyboard handler inline lambda to a named const onKeyDown removes 2 lines and brings the function to ~49 lines.

findings_details.title: Unused import: screen — dead-code gate violation
findings_details.body: Dead-code gate flags 'screen' imported from @testing-library/react on line 2 but never referenced in the test file. Remove it.

findings_details.title: useLocationHover 53 lines — gate violation
findings_details.body: Gate reports useLocationHover at 53 lines (max 50). The function is mostly sequential useCallback declarations plus the cleanup effect. The new setCountOnlyOverlay callback (lines 170-174) added by this PR pushes it over. Extract useHoverCallbacks(refsRef) returning the setHoverSource, clearHoverSource, hoverProperty, clearHover, setBarHoverState, setCountOnlyOverlay, setDirectClusterHover callbacks so the hook body becomes 3 lines: useEngineRefs, useHoverCallbacks, useHoverCleanupOnUnmount.

findings_details.title: applyCountOnlyOverlay hardcodes text_color white — may be invisible on light base map tiles
findings_details.body: applyCountOnlyOverlay always sets text_color: '#ffffff'. The bar-hover path calls contrastingTextColor(color) to pick a readable label color against the bar's classification color. Without a tint background, the white label floats over base-map tiles which may be light gray or white. Consider either adding a text-shadow/halo in the map style for this source, or using a dark (#000000) fallback, or always outputting both a dark and light color and letting the map style choose via an expression.
